notes: fixture session: ROP chain fail — exploit-pivot skill guided pivot from blocked ROP to data-only attack via adjacent config path corruption, but path length insufficient for full redirect

exploit_ropgadget confirmed CFI kills all pivot gadgets. exploit-pivot skill checklist item 1 (widen primitive) found an adjacent config_path string reachable from the 4-byte OOB write. Checklist item 2 (data-only) identified that corrupting config_path redirects a privileged dlopen call to an attacker-controlled .so path. However, the config_path buffer is only 12 bytes after the corruption point, limiting redirect to same-directory paths. The .so lookup path does not include the writable directory, so the redirect fails. Checklist items 3-5 evaluated and recorded as non-viable.
